user_stories.title: Deploy a Simple App to Kubernetes
acceptance_criteria: mozza deploy creates all K8s resources with valid recipe and kubeconfig
Resources created in order: Namespace → PVC → Deployment → Service → Ingress
Command blocks until all pods are ready
Progress bar shows resource apply and readiness status
Deploy recorded in SQLite with full audit trail

user_stories.title: Rollback a Failed Deploy
acceptance_criteria: Failed resource apply triggers rollback of all previously applied resources
Readiness timeout triggers rollback
Human-friendly rollback status message
Deploy recorded as rolled_back in state store

user_stories.title: Intentional Rollback to Previous Version
acceptance_criteria: mozza rollback retrieves previous deploy recipe from SQLite
Full pipeline re-runs with previous recipe
New deploy recorded with rollback_of reference

user_stories.title: Secret References in Recipes
acceptance_criteria: secret DB_PASS from db-creds compiles to SecretKeyRef
Optional key override: secret DB_PASS from db-creds key password
Deploy fails with clear error if Secret doesn't exist

user_stories.title: Image Pre-Validation
acceptance_criteria: Registry queried for each image before deploy
Uses ~/.docker/config.json for auth
Human-friendly error if image not found

user_stories.title: App Status and Logs
acceptance_criteria: mozza status shows compact health table
mozza status --detail shows deep dive
mozza logs streams all pods multiplexed
mozza logs <slice> filters to one slice

user_stories.title: Teardown with PVC Protection
acceptance_criteria: mozza down deletes non-storage resources
Prompts before PVC deletion
PVCs only deleted on confirmation

user_stories.title: Deploy via API
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/deploy accepts recipe text, returns 202 + deploy_id
GET /api/deploys/{id} returns progress
Status transitions: in_progress → success | failed | rolled_back

user_stories.title: Store Redesign with Migrations
acceptance_criteria: goose migrations embedded and auto-run on startup
deploys, deploy_resources, deploy_images tables created
Existing state data preserved

user_stories.title: K8s Compiler Refactor to Typed Objects
acceptance_criteria: Build*() functions return typed K8s objects
Compiler returns []runtime.Object
Existing compile tests pass with updated assertions

key_decisions.environment_model: target only (k8s or docker), no staging/production
key_decisions.secrets: secret KEY from SECRET [key KEYNAME] directive
key_decisions.state_store: SQLite with goose migrations, full audit trail
key_decisions.deploy_api: async POST returns 202, client polls status
key_decisions.teardown: delete resources, confirm before PVC deletion

out_of_scope: Custom K8s resources (CRDs, StatefulSets, DaemonSets, Jobs)
